# Python Frameworks

> A curated, community-maintained directory of popular Python frameworks, libraries, and tools — organized by category. Covers web development, REST APIs, ML/AI, LLM agents, task queues, web scraping, GUI/TUI, automated testing, DevOps, games, and enterprise integrations.

Site: https://pythonframeworks.com/
Source: https://github.com/jgujerry/pythonframeworks

## Categories

### Web Apps
Full-stack and WSGI/ASGI Python web frameworks. Includes Django, Flask, FastAPI, Starlette, Bottle, Tornado, CherryPy, Pyramid, Quart, Sanic, Litestar, and more.

### Web APIs
Frameworks for building REST and GraphQL APIs. Includes FastAPI, Django REST Framework (DRF), Flask-RESTful, Litestar, Connexion, Graphene, Ariadne, and more.

### Content Management System (CMS)
Python-based CMS frameworks. Includes Django CMS, Wagtail, Mezzanine, Plone, and more.

### ML, DL, and AI
Machine learning and deep learning frameworks. Includes PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, Keras, JAX, MXNet, PaddlePaddle, and more.

### LLM, Gen-AI, and Agents
Frameworks for building LLM-powered applications, generative AI, and autonomous agents. Includes LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, AutoGen, CrewAI, Haystack, Semantic Kernel, DSPy, and more.

### Task Queue and Messaging
Distributed task queue and message broker integrations. Includes Celery, RQ, Dramatiq, Huey, and more.

### Parallel and Distributed Computing
Frameworks for parallel and distributed workloads. Includes Ray, Dask, PySpark (Apache Spark), and more.

### Workflow and Pipelines
Workflow orchestration and data pipeline tools. Includes Apache Airflow, Prefect, Dagster, Luigi, Metaflow, and more.

### Serverless
Python frameworks for serverless and cloud functions. Includes Chalice, Zappa, Mangum, and more.

### DevOps
Infrastructure automation and DevOps tools. Includes Fabric, Ansible, SaltStack, and more.

### Web Crawling and Scraping
Web scraping and crawling frameworks. Includes Scrapy, Scrapling, BeautifulSoup, Firecrawl, Crawlee, MechanicalSoup, Trafilatura, Crawl4AI, and more.

### GUI and TUI Apps
Desktop GUI and terminal UI frameworks. Includes Tkinter, PyQt, Kivy, wxPython, Textual, Rich, and more.

### Games
Python game development frameworks. Includes Pygame, Arcade, Pyglet, Panda3D, and more.

### Automated Testing
Testing and quality assurance frameworks. Includes pytest, unittest, behave, Robot Framework, nose2, Splinter, PentestGPT, and more.

### Enterprise Integrations
Enterprise messaging and integration frameworks. Includes confluent-kafka, Apache Spark connectors, and more.

## Notes for AI Agents

- All frameworks listed are Python-based, open-source, and actively maintained (or historically significant).
- Each framework card links to its official GitHub repository.
- The directory is a single-page application — all content is on the root URL.
- Categories are navigable via anchor links: https://pythonframeworks.com/#Web-Apps, https://pythonframeworks.com/#LLM-Gen-AI-and-Agents, etc.
- The site is updated regularly; check the GitHub repository for the latest additions.
